text.primary.description: Main high-contrast text color. Used for body text, titles, headlines and primary icons to ensure maximum readability.

text.primary-inverse.description: Inverted text color for dark buttons and dark backgrounds. Used on dark surfaces (like primary-inverse backgrounds) to maintain contrast.

text.secondary.description: Medium-contrast supportive text. Used for secondary labels, subtitles, metadata, and placeholder text.

text.tertiary.description: Low-contrast muted text. Used for hints or non-essential decorative text.

text.action.description: Brand-colored interactive text. Used for links, clickable labels, and active navigation items.

text.action-highlight.description: Brand text for active/pressed states. Used for links and clickable labels when the mouse hovers over them.

text.action-disabled.description: Disabled or inactive state for button or link text.

text.caution.description: Dark text for warning context. Used for warning messages or status labels that require user attention.

text.caution-highlight.description: Hover state for warning-related text. Enhances visibility for interactive warning elements during hover.

text.danger.description: Dark text for error context. Used for error messages, critical alerts, and destructive action labels.

text.danger-highlight.description: Hover state for error-related text. Visual feedback for interactive destructive or error-prone elements.

background.primary.description: Main application surface. The base color for the entire page or main content areas.

background.primary-inverse.description: High-contrast dark surface. Use for high-emphasis containers like dark headers, sidebars, or hero cards.

background.secondary.description: Subtle secondary surface. Use for section backgrounds, form inputs, or to differentiate cards from the main page.

background.tertiary.description: Low-priority decorative surface. Use inside a component, e.g. the track behind a progress bar, or a disabled button surface. Not for page-level or section-level backgrounds.

background.action.description: Brand-colored action surface. The base color for primary buttons, active toggles, and brand-heavy elements.

background.action-highlight.description: Hover state for action surfaces. Specifically for primary button hover effects and interactive brand surfaces.

background.action-secondary.description: Default state for secondary button's surface.

background.action-secondary-highlight.description: Hover and active state for action surfaces. Specifically for secondary button hover effects, active state and interactive surfaces.

background.primary-disabled.description: Disabled or inactive state for primary button.

background.caution.description: Subtle amber background. Background color for warning banners, toast notifications, and alert callouts.

background.caution-highlight.description: Hover state for warning surfaces. Feedback color for interactive warning cards or actionable alerts on hover.

background.danger.description: Subtle red background. Background color for error banners, destructive action dialogs, or invalid states.

background.danger-highlight.description: Hover state for danger surfaces. Feedback color for "Delete" buttons or destructive UI elements on hover.

border.primary.description: High-contrast border. Use for component outlines, input field borders, and strong layout dividers.

border.primary-inverse.description: Inverted border for dark surfaces. Contrast border for elements placed on dark-themed containers.

border.secondary.description: Medium-contrast border. Use for card borders, internal table dividers, and secondary component outlines.

border.secondary-disabled.description: Disabled or inactive border state for secondary button.

border.tertiary.description: Low-contrast subtle border. Use for low-emphasis decorative lines or subtle element separation.

border.action.description: Brand-colored border. Use for active focus states, selection rings, and brand-themed outlines.

border.action-highlight.description: Hover state for brand-colored borders. Visual feedback when hovering over interactive brand elements (e.g., secondary buttons)

border.caution.description: Dark border for warning-related components. Used for borders on warning banners, alert cards, or validation states.

border.caution-highlight.description: Hover state for warning-related borders. Visual feedback for interactive warning components on hover.

border.danger.description: Dark border for error-related components. Used for invalid input fields, error banners, or critical alert containers.

border.danger-highlight.description: Hover state for error-related borders. Visual feedback for interactive destructive or error components on hover.

heading-underline.primary.description: Brand-colored heading accent. A specific decorative variable used for brand underlines beneath main titles.

purpose: Semantic color roles: text/*, background/*, border/*, action/*, icon/*. Values vary by theme mode — this is the canonical source for theme-aware colors.
